changes: index.html: .card-container background changed to linear-gradient(145deg, #1a1209, #2d1f0e, #1a1209) — dark parchment
index.html: border upgraded to 2px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.45) + box-shadow with inset glow
index.html: ::before/::after pseudo-elements add Celtic corner accents in #c9a84c
index.html: .card-biome-badge — small pill top-right with biome name in gold
index.html: .card-divider — gold gradient horizontal rule below badge
index.html: .card-narrative — Georgia serif font, #f5e6c8 cream, italic, line-height 1.7
index.html: .card-option — dark bg rgba(10,7,3,0.7), gold border, hover gold glow + translateY(-3px)
index.html: .faction-dot — 7px colored circle per faction before verb
CardOverlay.ts: buildFactionDot() injects colored dot per FACTION_COLOURS map
CardOverlay.ts: biome badge + card-divider inserted into DOM each card show
